data.title: China Restricts Stablecoin Research and Seminars to Mitigate Risks
data.description:
China's financial regulators halt stablecoin research to control market overheating and potential risks.
source: https://coincu.com/353544-china-stablecoin-research-halt

data.title: Stablecoin payments hit $5T but FX fees still drag growth
data.description:
Stablecoin transactions have passed $5 trillion this year, with their value up 47% since the 2024 U. S. election.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/stablecoin-payments-top-5t-as-fx-fees-weigh/

data.description:
Multiple major brokerages and financial institutions have reportedly been instructed behind closed doors to cancel upcoming seminars and remove research […] The post China Silently Pressures Brokerages to Pull Back on Stablecoin Promotions appeared first on Coindoo.

data.title: BlackRock Declines XRP, SOL ETF Launch Amidst Leadership Shifts
data.description:
BlackRock confirms no plans for XRP, SOL ETFs; focuses on BTC and ETH ETFs.
source: https://coincu.com/353532-blackrock-xrp-sol-etf-decision

data.title: Eric Trump Warns Against Shorting Bitcoin and Ethereum
data.description: According to Foresight News, Eric Trump, the second son of U.S. President Donald Trump, recently posted on X, advising against shorting Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH). He cautioned that those who do so may face significant losses.

data.title: Fidelity Sees Significant Inflows in FETH and FBTC
data.description: According to BlockBeats, recent data from Farside Investors indicates that Fidelity's FETH experienced a net inflow of $132 million, while FBTC saw a net inflow of $30.5 million. These substantial inflows highlight growing investor interest in these financial products.

data.title: World Liberty Financial Seeks to Establish Public Company for Token Holdings
data.description: According to BlockBeats, World Liberty Financial (WLFI), backed by the Trump family, is in discussions with major investors to form a publicly listed company to hold its WLFI tokens. This move aims to capitalize on the growing trend of digital asset reserve companies. Sources familiar with the matter indicate that the deal's structure is still being finalized, with a fundraising target of approximately $1.5 billion. Significant investors from the technology and cryptocurrency sectors have been approached to participate in this initiative.

data.title: REX-Osprey SOL ETF Sees Significant Inflows
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Farside Investors reported that the REX-Osprey SOL spot ETF experienced a net inflow of $6.4 million yesterday. Since its launch, the ETF has accumulated a total net inflow of $141 million.

data.title: Trump-Backed World Liberty Financial Plans $1.5 Billion Token Launch
data.description:
World Liberty Financial supported by the Trump family to launch a public company for WLFI tokens, eyeing $1. 5 billion in fundraising.
source: https://coincu.com/353523-trump-family-wlfi-token-launch

data.description:
Ukraine plans to align its crypto regulations with European standards by August 2025.

data.title: Trader Reduces ETH Short Position Amid Significant Losses
data.description: According to PANews, a trader has significantly reduced their 25x leveraged short position on Ethereum (ETH), incurring a realized loss of $15.81 million. Despite this reduction, the trader still faces an unrealized loss of $3.3 million, as reported by Onchain Lens.

Cryptocurrency market sees real recovery chance as multiple assets start moving forward

data.title: Billionaire Ken Griffin Buys Massive Stake in Asset That’s Soared 124% This Year
data.description:
Billionaire investor Ken Griffin is placing a major bet on a company that’s far outperformed expectations this year. According to a filing with the U. S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), Griffin’s hedge fund Citadel has acquired 3,824,329 shares of NioCorp Developments Ltd (NB), a company advancing critical minerals development in the United States
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/08/08/billionaire-ken-griffin-buys-massive-stake-in-asset-thats-soared-124-this-year/

data.title: Harvard holds $117M in BlackRock’s Spot Bitcoin ETF
data.description:
Harvard’s endowment disclosed a $116. 7M stake in BlackRock’s iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT), about 1. 9M shares.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/harvard-holds-117m-in-ibit/

data.title: From Aerodrome to Uniswap: Coinbase now routes DEX trades inside its app
data.description:
Coinbase has begun integrating DEX trading directly into its app via Base, expanding user access to millions of tokens compared to the current 300 listed assets, according to an Aug. 8 announcement.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/from-aerodrome-to-uniswap-coinbase-now-routes-dex-trades-inside-its-app/

data.title: Ripple’s Multi-Front Strategy That Could Ignite an XRP Bull Run: Here is What You Need to Know
data.description:
“Ripple’s Multi-Front Strategy That Could Ignite an XRP Bull Run: Here is What You Need to Know” 

Ripple is actively employing a multifaceted approach aimed at enhancing the utility and adoption of its digital currency, XRP, and this strategy could potentially lead to a significant increase in its market value. Here’s a deeper look into the key components of this strategy and what investors and crypto enthusiasts need to understand as they evaluate the future prospects of XRP in light of these developments.
source: https://blocknews.com/ripples-multi-front-strategy-that-could-ignite-an-xrp-bull-run-here-is-what-you-need-to-know/

data.title: S&P Global Assigns 'B-' Rating to Sky Protocol
data.description:
S&P Global assigns 'B-' rating to USDS issuer Sky Protocol, citing centralization risks. Rune Christensen holds significant control.
source: https://coincu.com/353517-sp-global-b-minus-rating-sky-protocol

data.title: Bullish Technicals Signal Explosive Ethereum Rally — Breakout Above THIS Zone Could Send Price Soaring to $4,400
data.description:
Bullish technical indicators suggest that Ethereum is positioned for a significant upward movement. A breakout above this critical price zone could lead to a dramatic increase in value, potentially driving the price up to as high as $4,400. Investors and traders should keep a close eye on this key level, as crossing it may trigger heightened buying activity and momentum that propels Ethereum to new heights.
source: https://blocknews.com/bullish-technicals-signal-explosive-ethereum-rally-breakout-above-this-zone-could-send-price-soaring-to-4400/

data.title: Ripple CTO Clears the Air on XRP’s Launch, Stablecoin, and Decentralization Claims
data.description:
The Chief Technology Officer of Ripple recently took the opportunity to clarify various aspects surrounding the launch of XRP, the company’s digital currency, as well as addressing questions related to the stablecoin market and the ongoing debates about the level of decentralization associated with Ripple's technology and its implications for regulatory compliance. Throughout the discussion, he provided detailed insights into Ripple's vision for the future of digital assets, the role of XRP within that ecosystem, and how the company is navigating the complexities of an evolving financial landscape, particularly in relation to the challenges of cryptocurrency regulation and the broader acceptance of stablecoins in the market.
source: https://blocknews.com/ripple-cto-clears-the-air-on-xrps-launch-stablecoin-and-decentralization-claims/
